# CCA Claude Code CLI Execution Contract: G31-POLICY-SEARCH-UI-T001

You are Claude Code CLI running as an external black-box executor under Codex Control.
Codex is the controller, reviewer, and only source of PASS/FAIL truth.
You may use any local Claude Code internal planning, dynamic workflow, ultracode, or fan-out subagents available in this CLI, but the final output must obey the boundary below.
Do not ask the user to interact with Claude directly.
Do not claim PASS. Codex will review Git diff, tests, policy events, and this run's receipt.
External LLM egress for this bounded task has been approved by the CCA request artifact; do not request a separate user approval inside Claude.

## Objective
Implement G31_POLICY_SEARCH_RESEARCH_UI: add compact local G30 policy-search summaries and a read-only Policy Search Dashboard under the existing Research tab. Show deterministic policy search results, 12 x 8 x 3 = 288 matrix shape, objective rankings, Pareto frontier, policy config details, complexity breakdown, scoring policy, risk semantics warning, and non-claims. Do not add simulation logic, do not alter G30 results, do not mutate GameState or dispatch PlayerAction, do not call Ollama, fetch, or external APIs, and do not claim real-world organization conclusions.

## Codex plan
- Implement the objective within the approved boundary.

## Allowed write paths
- src/data/policySearchSummaries.ts
- src/ui/PolicySearchDashboard.tsx
- src/ui/ResearchDashboard.tsx
- tests/data/policySearchSummaries.test.ts
- tests/ui/PolicySearchDashboard.test.tsx
- tests/ui/ResearchDashboard.test.tsx
- verification/G31/
- .codex/research_record.md
- .codex/research_report.md

## Disallowed paths
- .git/
- .claude/
- .runtime/sealed/
- .runtime/private_archives/
- .codex/memories/
- .env
- **/*secret*
- **/*token*
- verification/G30/
- src/game/
- src/sim/

## Required tests to run or leave for Codex verification
- npm run test -- tests/data/policySearchSummaries.test.ts tests/ui/PolicySearchDashboard.test.tsx tests/ui/ResearchDashboard.test.tsx
- npm run test
- npx tsc -b
- npx vite build --base=/agent-factory/

## Required Runtime Kernel artifacts
Write `.runtime/tasks/G31-POLICY-SEARCH-UI-T001/worker_heartbeat.json` after you understand the task.
Write `.runtime/tasks/G31-POLICY-SEARCH-UI-T001/worker_result.json` before stopping.
The worker_result.json object must include task_id, slot_id, dispatch_id, status, changed_files, tests_run_by_worker, and known_risks.
